# ToolResultContent.StructuredContent property

OPTIONAL. A structured result value of any JSON type (object, array, string, number, boolean, or null). If the tool defined an output schema (§16), this SHOULD conform to it (spec §21.2.6).

public JsonNode? StructuredContent { get; set; }
